titleStmt.title: SII 26.479: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 479. (A.R. No. 456 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bhagavatīśvara temple.

This damaged inscription records a gift of land as tax-free dēvadāna made by the king in Kuḍaikkuḷam in the western quarter of Śēravaṉmādēvicch-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu, to provide for the festival held on the birth-day of the king in the month of Vaikāśi in the temple of the god (name lost) in Śuttamalli alias Vīravinōdach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēl-vēmba-nāḍu. It seems that the request for the gift was made by a certain Nambi (full name not preserved) of Mānābharaṇa-maṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ
melvempanāṭṭu cuttamalliyāṉa viraviṉotaccaturvvetimaṅkalat
�ko ṉattāṟkku Innāyaṉāṟkku nām piṟan
ta vaiykā ttu tīrttham prasātikka kaṇṭa tirunāḷukku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷināṭṭuc ceravaṉmāteviccaturvve timaṅ
kalattu melpiṭākai kuṭaikkuḷattil Innāyaṉārkku muṉpu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāka nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlak kallukkuḷppaṭṭa Eṭṭumāvum muṉṉuṭai
yārum paḻampeyarum muṉṟāvatiṉetir Eḻāvatu mutal kāraṇmai
yu miyāṭciyumuḻutāṉkuṭi pāṭikāvalu maṟṟum Eppeyaṟpaṭṭiṉavum U
ṭppaṭa Ivvāṇṭumutal Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟum māṉāparaṇamaṅkalat
tu nampi maiyil Innāyaṉāṟkku nām piṟanta vaiykā
�kattu tīrttham prasātikka kaṇṭa tirunāḷukku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷināṭṭu ceravaṉmāteviccaturvveti
maṅkalattu melpiṭākai kuṭaikkuḷattil Innāyaṉārkku muṉpu te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukkuḷppaṭṭa
ṉuppaṭi muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperumuta
lun tavittu kārāṇmai miyāṭcciyum Uḻutāṉkuṭi pāṭikā
valum maṟṟum Eppeyaṟppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭppaṭa I
vvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Ippa
ṭi sandrādityavaṟai celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivit
tukoḷka Ivai cevirukkaināṭṭu kaḷattāvūr tiruvirāmiśvaramuṭai
yāṉ Āḷkoṇṭa villiyāṉa kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.479 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
